_description: Seed registry of state legal documents for pan-India compounding schedule parsing. PDFs are NOT stored in git — only URLs, hashes, and extracted evidence.

MH.title_hint: Maharashtra Motor Vehicles (Compounding of Offences) Rules — Fee Schedule
MH.notes: Official MH Transport Dept. Periodically revised. Check for amendment notifications.

MH.title_hint: Maharashtra Traffic Police eChallan Fine Table
MH.notes: Operationally-used fine amounts; may differ slightly from gazette.

DL.notes: Delhi Transport Dept official gazette notification.
Operational fine chart used by Delhi Traffic Police.

KA.notes: Karnataka Transport Dept. Cross-check with latest gazette notifications.

UP.notes: UP Transport Dept. One of highest-volume states for traffic violations.

GJ.notes: Gujarat RTO official. Gujarat often has lower compounding amounts than central.

MP.notes: MP Transport official. Verify against gazette notifications.

WB.notes: WB Transport Dept. Often has older gazette versions — check amendments.

HR.title_hint: Haryana Motor Vehicles Compounding Fee Schedule
HR.notes: Haryana Transport Dept. Often matches central amounts post-MVA 2019.

BR.notes: Bihar Transport Dept. Verify — Bihar has historically delayed gazette adoption.
